name: persona-performer-setlist
note: S-COMPOSE-CALM slice 3, P4 Performer goalpost (design table: 'Setlist -> Perform; Compose only for quick key checks'). Fixture: a lived-in setlist-heavy device (5 catalog songs seeded via the runner's 'seed' map - catalog ids are k<index>). The journey: Setlist tab shows the set with Start thumb-reachable in the static head row (UAT 2026-07-16 contract), one tap opens the Stage with a real sheet, prev/next present; exit; Compose serves the mid-gig key check (key chip up, zero song chrome, no tips - this performer has seen them, including the backup nudge, which CORRECTLY fires for an un-backed-up 5-song set and is dismissed in the fixture; first red run proved it).

steps.label: the seeded setlist is heavy and healed (all 5 catalog ids resolve - none pruned)
one tap to the Stage: overlay on, a real sheet rendered, position readout live
F7 portrait: transpose is out of the top bar (gear sheet owns it) and the remaining icons are 44px+
next-song works mid-set (title changed to the 2nd seeded song)
Stage closes clean back to the app
Compose = the quick key check: key chip visible, zero ambient song chrome, no tip interrupts a performer who's seen them
steps.js: (function(){function gone(sel){var e=document.querySelector(sel);return !e || e.hidden || e.getBoundingClientRect().height===0;}var chip=document.getElementById('keyPickerCompact');var tips=Array.prototype.filter.call(document.querySelectorAll('.notableBanner'),function(n){return n.offsetParent!==null;});return !!chip && chip.offsetParent!==null && gone('#composeModeSeg') && gone('#songTray') && tips.length===0;})()
